name: Church Window Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the first three ingredients until melted, then let cool.
2. Add marshmallows and nuts to the mixture and stir until all marshmallows and nuts are coated with the chocolate mixture.
3. Spread half of the cookie mixture onto wax paper in a single line and roll into cookies.
4. Repeat with the remaining half of the mixture.
5. Place the cookies in the refrigerator until hardened.
6. Cut into individual cookies.
Tasty and very pretty.
